title: Interesting Message Stored in Cowrie Logs, (Wed, Mar 18th)

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Interesting Message Stored in Cowrie Logs, (Wed, Mar 18th)
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '188.214.30.5'
            - '64.89.161.198'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*www.shodan.io*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Interesting_Message_Stored_in_Cowrie_Log {
    meta:
        description = "Interesting Message Stored in Cowrie Logs, (Wed, Mar 18th)"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "f1c0e109640d154246d27ff05074365740e994f142ef9846634bec7b18e3b715" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
suricata: alert ip any any -> 188.214.30.5 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Interesting_Message_Stored_in_"; sid:7981874; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 64.89.161.198 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Interesting_Message_Stored_in_"; sid:2214852; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 188.214.30.5 any (msg:"CDB APEX Interesting_Message_Stored_in_"; sid:5947546; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 64.89.161.198 any (msg:"CDB APEX Interesting_Message_Stored_in_"; sid:5701123; rev:1;)
